en.question: Is 13 a prime number?
en.explanation: 13 = 13 × 1 only. A prime number has exactly two factors: 1 and itself. Therefore 13 is prime.

hi.explanation: 13 = 13 × 1 only. A prime number has exactly two factors: 1 and itself. Therefore 13 is prime.
